scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=4000 nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "ts-node src/server.ts"
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./data/test.sqlite node --test --test-concurrency=1 -r ts-node/register tests/*.test.ts
scripts.db:reset:e2e: node -e "for (const f of ['./data/e2e.sqlite','./data/e2e.sqlite-wal','./data/e2e.sqlite-shm']) require('fs').rmSync(f,{force:true})" && cross-env DB_PATH=./data/e2e.sqlite NODE_ENV=development npm run seed
scripts.start:e2e: cross-env DB_PATH=./data/e2e.sqlite NODE_ENV=production RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED=1 DEMO_AUTH_ENABLED=1 OPENROUTER_API_KEY= PORT=4312 JWT_SECRET=e2e-secret CORS_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5175 ts-node src/server.ts
